name: derive-ip-contract
description: Generate a per-IP evidence contract without selecting a static IP profile.

tasks.detail: Read <ip>/yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml and, when available, <ip>/verify/equivalence_goals.json. Do not pick a static profile.
tasks.criteria: The derivation input is the IP's own SSOT/IO/transaction/state/timing/debug information.

tasks.detail: Infer capabilities, required monitors, required mutations, observables, and required evidence from the IP artifacts.
Use ip_contract.json as the obligation source for signoff, mutation, monitor generation, and future TB generation.
tasks.criteria: Downstream gates refer to contract obligations rather than APB/CSR assumptions.
